cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my younger brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Mr. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: baa1 leoi4 mou5 baan1
cards.english: [Ballet Class]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: Peppa準備上佢第一次嘅芭蕾舞堂
cards.jyutping: zeon2 bei6 soeng5 keoi5 dai6 jat1 ci3 ge3 baa1 leoi4 mou5 tong4
cards.english: Peppa is getting ready for her first ballet class

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 佢係芭蕾舞老師，瞪羚太太
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 baa1 leoi4 mou5 lou5 si1 cing4 ling4 taai3 taai2
cards.english: She is the ballet teacher, Madame Gazelle

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 aa3 nei5 jat1 ding6 zau6 hai6 laa3
cards.english: Hello, you must be Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zau6 hai6 cing4 ling4 taai3 taai2 laa3
cards.english: I... am Mrs. Gazelle

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: cing4 ling4 taai3 taai2 nei5 hou2
cards.english: Hello, Mrs. Gazelle

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: ngo4 nei5 zan1 hai6 hou2 gwaai1 aa3
cards.english: Oh, you're so well-behaved, Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 好喇，歡迎你嚟呢度上第一堂芭蕾舞堂啊
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa3 fun1 jing4 nei5 lai4 ni1 dou6 soeng5 dai6 jat1 tong4 baa1 leoi4 mou5 tong4 aa3
cards.english: Okay, welcome to your first ballet class here

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zan6 gaan1 faan2 lai4 zip3 nei5 aa1
cards.english: I'll come back to pick you up later

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: baai1 baai3
cards.english: Bye-bye

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: maan6 maan2 hok6 laa1
cards.english: Take your time learning

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: ne1 baan1 hai6 ge3 pang4 jau5
cards.english: This class consists of Peppa's friends

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: tung4 maai4
cards.english: Candy, Susie, Danny, Rebecca, and Pedro

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 咁多位，今日我哋有位新嘅同學加入
cards.jyutping: gam3 do1 wai6 gam1 jat6 ngo5 dei6 jau5 wai6 san1 ge3 tung4 hok6 gaa1 jap6
cards.english: Everyone, today we have a new student joining us

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: Her name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: lai4 laa1 gwo3 heoi3 daa2 go3 ziu1 fu1 aa1
cards.english: Come on, Peppa, go say hello.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: gam3 do1 wai6 hou2 maa1
cards.english: Hello, everyone!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 nei5 hou2
cards.english: -Hello, Peppa. -Hello, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 好喇，各位同學，首先就係Demi-plié
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa3 gok3 wai2 tung4 hok6 sau2 sin1 zau6 hai6
cards.english: Alright, class, first we'll do the Demi-plié.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 zau6 gaau3 tiu3 bou6
cards.english: Now we're going to learn the hopping step, Petit jeté.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: jiu3 hou2 jau5 mei5 gam2 gam2 tiu3 gaa4
cards.english: You need to jump with elegance.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: hou2 jau5 mei5 gam2 gam2 tiu3
cards.english: Petit jeté needs to be jumped with elegance.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: hou2 jau5 mei5 gam2 gam2 tiu3
cards.english: Petit jeté needs to be jumped with elegance.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: baa1 leoi4 mou5 tong4 fei1 soeng4 jau5 ceoi3 aa3
cards.english: Ballet class is so much fun!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 geoi2 hei2 soeng1 sau2 aa1
cards.english: Everyone, raise your hands!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 想像下自己係隻好靚嘅天鵝
cards.jyutping: soeng2 zoeng6 haa6 zi6 gei2 hai6 zek3 hou2 leng3 ge3 tin1 ngo4
cards.english: Imagine you're a beautiful swan.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: gok3 wai2 tung4 hok6
cards.english: Alright, class.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 你哋覺得天鵝會發出啲咩聲呢？
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 gok3 dak1 tin1 ngo4 wui6 faat3 ceot1 di1 me1 sing1 ne1
cards.english: What sounds do you think a swan makes?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: jiu3 hou2 jau5 mei5 gam2 gam2 tiu3
cards.english: Dance with grace.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: Peppa鍾意跳舞，大家都鍾意跳舞
cards.jyutping: zung1 ji3 tiu3 mou5 daai6 gaa1 dou1 zung1 ji3 tiu3 mou5
cards.english: Peppa loves to dance, everyone loves to dance.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 媽咪…我哋扮天鵝跳舞啊
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 dei6 baan6 tin1 ngo4 tiu3 mou5 aa3
cards.english: Mommy... let's dance like swans!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: tiu3 dak1 fei1 soeng4 zi1 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Peppa is dancing very well!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 我要好有美感噉跳，仲要好優雅噉跳
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jiu3 hou2 jau5 mei5 gam2 gam2 tiu3 zung6 jiu3 hou2 jau1 ngaa5 gam2 tiu3
cards.english: I want to dance with grace, and with elegance.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: gam2 mai5 hou2 leng3 lo1
cards.english: Then it will be very pretty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 si6 faan6 bei2 nei5 tai2 dim2 tiu3 aa1
cards.english: I'll show you how to dance.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 faan1 uk1 kei2 sin1 laa1
cards.english: Let's go home first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 之後你就可以示範畀我同爹哋 仲有George睇啦
cards.jyutping: zi1 hau6 nei5 zau6 ho2 ji5 si6 faan6 bei2 ngo5 tung4 de1 dei6 zung6 jau5 tai2 laa1
cards.english: Then you can show me, Daddy, and George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: baai1 baai3
cards.english: Bye-bye.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 faan1 dou3 uk1 kei2 laa3
cards.english: Mrs. Pig and Peppa returned home.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6
cards.english: Daddy, George!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 我要示範畀你睇點跳芭蕾舞
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jiu3 si6 faan6 bei2 nei5 tai2 dim2 tiu3 baa1 leoi4 mou5
cards.english: I'm going to show you how to dance ballet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: wui6 m4 wui6 hou2 naan4 gaa4
cards.english: Is it going to be very difficult?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: deoi3 ngo5 lai4 gong2 zau6 hou2 gaan2 daan1
cards.english: It's very simple for me.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 但係你、George同埋媽咪就會覺得好難喇
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 nei5 tung4 maai4 maa1 mi4 zau6 wui6 gok3 dak1 hou2 naan4 laa3
cards.english: But you, George, and Mommy will find it difficult.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 jiu3 fong3 di1 jam1 ngok6
cards.english: First, you need to put on some music.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: hou2 ji4 gaa1 de1 dei6 tung4 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Okay, now George, Daddy, and Mommy,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 zau6 jiu3 gan1 zyu6 ngo5 zou6 laak3
cards.english: You have to follow what I do.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 瞪羚太太講埋啲好奇怪嘅字
cards.jyutping: cing4 ling4 taai3 taai2 gong2 maai4 di1 hou2 kei4 gwaai3 ge3 zi6
cards.english: Mrs. Gazelle is saying some strange words.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 但係其實，只不過係曲膝
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 kei4 sat6 zi2 bat1 gwo3 hai6 kuk1 sat1
cards.english: But actually, it's just bending your knees.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 zau6 tiu3
cards.english: And then jump.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: aa3 hai6
cards.english: Ah, it's a Petite Jeté.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 爹哋，你識得嗰啲怪字嘎？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 nei5 sik1 dak1 go2 di1 gwaai3 zi6 gaa1
cards.english: Daddy, do you know those strange words?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 我同媽咪以前跳芭蕾舞都幾叻㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 tung4 maa1 mi4 ji5 cin4 tiu3 baa1 leoi4 mou5 dou1 gei2 lek1 gaa4
cards.english: Mommy and I used to be quite good at ballet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 siu2 sam1 di1 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: You need to be careful, Dad.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 我哋最鍾意嘅係pas de deux
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zeoi3 zung1 ji3 ge3 hai6
cards.english: Our favorite was the pas de deux.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 呢一下同我記憶中有啲出入
cards.jyutping: ne1 jat1 haa6 tung4 ngo5 gei3 jik1 zung1 jau5 di1 ceot1 jap6
cards.english: This part is a little different from what I remember.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 zan1 hai6 so4 aa3
cards.english: Dad is really silly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.characters: 我哋都係等Peppa嚟跳芭蕾舞啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 dou1 hai6 dang2 lai4 tiu3 baa1 leoi4 mou5 laa1
cards.english: Let's just wait for Peppa to come dance ballet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa1 ngo5 hai6 tiu3 dak1 zeoi3 lek1 gaa4
cards.english: Okay, I am the best dancer.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E31 Ballet Lesson［芭蕾舞班］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 zek3 leng3 leng3 tin1 ngo4
cards.english: I am a beautiful swan.
